themes.name: Feature Requests And Issues
themes.description: Users are requesting new features and reporting issues with the app, including problems with trading and customer support. They are also suggesting improvements to existing features.
representativeQuotes: BAD EXPERIENCE. DURING MCX TRADING ON 09 Jun 26 , MY OPTION BUY ORDER GOT STUCK
actionIdeas: Add a stochastic indicator to the charting tool
Implement an auto trial stop loss feature to help users avoid losses

themes.name: Ease Of Use
themes.description: Users praise the app for being easy to use and having a simple interface. They appreciate the intuitive design and fast access to services.
representativeQuotes: Easy Interface and Fast access to all the services
very easy to use this app
it is very easy app to manage all mutual fund
actionIdeas: Simplify the onboarding process for new users
Continuously gather feedback to maintain a user-friendly interface

themes.name: Easy Investment Experience
themes.description: Users praise Groww for its user-friendly interface and ease of use for investing in stocks and mutual funds. They find it convenient for tracking portfolios and making informed investment decisions.
representativeQuotes: The interface is clean, SIP setup for mutual funds is simple, and buying stocks/ETFs is straightforward.
Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds.
Excellent app with a very clean and user-friendly interface.
actionIdeas: Enhance research tools and advanced trading features to cater to experienced investors.
Integrate AI-powered predictive analytics to improve investment decisions.

themes.name: High Brokerage Charges
themes.description: Users are complaining about high brokerage charges and hidden fees on the Groww app. They are unhappy with the lack of clarity and transparency in the charges.
representativeQuotes: worst experience in app very high brokerage charges
Charging too much, as compared to other apps.
brokerage charges increased, the charges are very high rs 5 per trade
actionIdeas: Review and adjust brokerage charges to be more competitive
Improve transparency and clarity in charging structure

themes.name: Poor Customer Support
themes.description: Users are frustrated with Groww's customer support, citing unhelpful and rude representatives, technical glitches, and unresponsive service. Many have had issues resolved slowly or not at all.
representativeQuotes: Customer support is the worst. Does not help
worst customer support very bad ,really very bad
User Interface is okay. But Customer Service is the worst.
actionIdeas: Improve customer support training and responsiveness
Implement a more effective issue tracking and resolution system
